reviews.comment:
Atencion super lenta. Te hacen parar del lado que tenes el tanque, no mueven la manguera...

(Translated by Google)
Extremely slow service. They make you stop on the side where your tank is, they don't even move the hose...

reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
Es muy buena la atención de los playeros la verdad muy agradecido

(Translated by Google)
The service from the beach attendants is excellent, I'm very grateful.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar, atención y limpieza

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, service and cleanliness

reviews.comment:
Muy bien lugar para cargar combustible o tomar algo. Tiene variedad de golosinas, bebidas, sandwich y algunas comidas. Los baños muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to fill up on gas or grab a bite to eat. It has a variety of snacks, drinks, sandwiches, and some meals. The bathrooms are very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlX2Z5QWtBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atención rápida y amables.

(Translated by Google)
Fast and friendly service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlOWEteW1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
No me gusto la atecion del playero , en ese caso fui de medrugada antes de agarrar ruta vuelta a bs as ....muy apatico con poca actitud quizas un mal dia tenia .

(Translated by Google)
I didn't like the service from the beach attendant; in that case, I went early in the morning before heading back to Buenos Aires... very apathetic with little attitude, perhaps he was having a bad day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlbVlILTFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy rápidos. Falta de combustible a veces

(Translated by Google)
Very fast. Sometimes they run out of fuel.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención pero cuando hay cola se demora bastante porque tienen dos sectores de surtidores pero solo usan uno

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but when there's a queue it takes quite a while because they have two pump sections but only use one.
